title: Starter audit prompt
content: Audit this finance page for AI citation readiness. Score it, identify risky claims, recommend better H2s, suggest tables and FAQs, map internal links, and give me a publish checklist.

title: Safer funding rewrite
content: Replace guaranteed approval language with fit-based wording that explains the criteria, the audience, and the limits of the offer.

title: Sample audit output
content: Citation readiness: 78/100. Strong answer block. Missing comparison table. CTA implies certainty. Add supporting FAQ and internal link to the funding explainer.
